steps.title: Combine matching terms
steps.content:
Combine the terms with the same factor:
$$
3(6-7x)+5(6-7x)+10=7(6-7x)+4
$$
$$
8(6-7x)+10=7(6-7x)+4
$$

steps.title: Isolate the expression
steps.content:
Subtract $7(6-7x)$ from both sides, then subtract $10$:
$$
6-7x+10=4
$$
$$
6-7x=-6
$$

steps.title: Negate the expression
steps.content: The requested expression is the opposite of $6-7x$: $$ 7x-6=-(6-7x)=-(-6)=6 $$ The answer is 6.
